form.formComment: Last start rolled along in front before being edged out 2nd of 8 at Queanbeyan Cl1-Sw on March 21 over 1600m, on a slow track; 1.5 len behind Hard Grunt carrying 59kg at $15. The run before that 8th of 11 at Queanbeyan Bm50 on February 17 over 1600m, 7 len behind Incantata carrying 59.5kg at $31. Back in form and worth following.

Can improve in this far easier race.

form.formComment: Recent form sound. Comes off a 31 day let-up. Last start tracked the speed and boxed on steadily 3rd of 12 at Wagga Ctry Mdn-Sw on March 12 over 1600m, 2 len behind Dunna Runna with 57kg at $2.25. Before that made some head-way from midfield; 2nd of 11 at Wagga Super Mdn-Sw on February 28 over 1400m, 0.6 len behind Just Hear Me Out with 57kg at $6. Going well and a win is well and truly overdue.
